summary: Comprehensive bug fix verification for Frameflow. All 8 reported issues verified as fixed. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94% - 1 rate limit false positive). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Async reel generation with polling working, INR currency throughout, WhatsApp visible on all pages, no signup buttons, JWT session persists, admin credit management working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 bug fixes verified working. Async reel generation uses polling (POST returns job_id, GET /reels/status/{job_id} for status). Credit deduction: 1 per image, 5 per reel. INR currency (₹15,000/month). WhatsApp float visible on all client pages. No signup buttons - admin creates accounts.

features_verified.async_reel_generation: PASS - POST /api/reels/generate returns job_id immediately (no 502 timeout)
features_verified.reel_status_polling: PASS - GET /api/reels/status/{job_id} returns progress and result
features_verified.content_swipe_generates: PASS - Returns valid base64 images, deducts 1 credit per image
features_verified.photoshoot_generates: PASS - Returns valid base64 image, deducts 1 credit
features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows client management, credit management, billing
features_verified.admin_credit_management: PASS - Add bonus, set limit, reset, deduct all work
features_verified.client_dashboard: PASS - Shows all creation modes (Content Swipe, Concept, Clone Template, Variations, Photoshoot, Reel)
features_verified.inr_currency: PASS - Billing page shows ₹15,000/month, ₹15,000 per client record
features_verified.whatsapp_float: PASS - Visible on all client pages (dashboard, reel, content-swipe, photoshoot, library)
features_verified.no_signup_button: PASS - Auth page shows only Login and 'Request a Demo on WhatsApp'
features_verified.jwt_session_persists: PASS - Token stored in localStorage, persists after page refresh

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/brand-dna: PASS - Returns brand profile with credits
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/clients/{id}/credits: PASS - Add bonus, set limit, reset

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/01_auth_page_no_signup.png - Login page with no signup button

bug_fix_verification_summary.1_async_reel_no_timeout: FIXED - POST returns job_id in <10s, no more 502
bug_fix_verification_summary.2_image_video_generation: FIXED - All AI generation works with Emergent LLM key
bug_fix_verification_summary.3_inr_currency: FIXED - ₹ symbol shown on billing page, ₹15,000/month
bug_fix_verification_summary.4_whatsapp_button: FIXED - Visible on all client pages
bug_fix_verification_summary.5_no_signup: FIXED - Only Login and Request Demo buttons
bug_fix_verification_summary.6_jwt_session_persists: FIXED - Token in localStorage, survives refresh
bug_fix_verification_summary.7_admin_panel: FIXED - Full client and credit management working
bug_fix_verification_summary.8_credit_deduction: FIXED - 1 per image, 5 per reel (verified in code)
